description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that builds a Jekyll static site using the provided site configuration: define a collection called "code" with path "/code/" and permalink "/code/index.html", exclude files matching "*.jinja2", set the syntax highlighter to rouge, include the "code" directory, configure kramdown to use GFM input, set markdown to kramdown, and set the site name to "CS 1331". Add a single job in a "build" stage that runs on the ruby:3.2 Docker image, installs bundler, runs "bundle install" and then "jekyll build", and publishes the generated site directory (public/) as an artifact. No services, caches, or special rules are required.
